n8nGuides.name: Medspa Consult Capture
n8nGuides.trigger: Website form or treatment quiz submission
n8nGuides.outcome: Route treatment interest into instant acknowledgment, qualification, staff alert, and follow-up.
n8nGuides.sellLine: This turns treatment browsing into a concierge path instead of a generic contact form.

n8nGuides.name: Missed-Call Text-Back
n8nGuides.outcome: Send immediate text-back, capture urgency, notify team, and log the opportunity.
n8nGuides.sellLine: The fastest practical AI win: recover leads when staff is busy or after hours.

n8nGuides.name: Review Request Engine
n8nGuides.outcome: Send timed review requests, branch unhappy feedback privately, and feed proof vault.
n8nGuides.sellLine: More reviews without begging manually — with unhappy feedback routed before it becomes public.

n8nGuides.name: Lead-to-Close Room Router
n8nGuides.trigger: New qualified lead added to Stratos board
n8nGuides.outcome: Create the next-best-action packet: audit checklist, offer tier, close-room link, and first-touch copy.
n8nGuides.sellLine: This keeps Bradley focused on the next revenue action instead of hunting through files.

templates.name: Client Intake Snapshot
templates.use: Capture the exact info needed before proposing/building.

templates.name: Automation Scope Sheet
templates.use: Define triggers, systems, fallback behavior, and proof before touching n8n.

templates.name: Launch QA Checklist
templates.use: Prevent broken mobile CTAs, fake claims, missing tracking, and messy handoff.

logistics.action: Pick 3 targets, run audit checklist, send one specific opener, log status.
Complete client intake snapshot and automation scope sheet before quoting integrations.
Start from website conversion map, then add n8n workflows only where the trigger/outcome is obvious.
Run mobile CTA, form, webhook, notification, fallback, analytics, and proof-claim checks.
Send owner summary: leads captured, missed calls recovered, reviews requested, bottlenecks, next optimization.

nextBuildIdeas: Add a lightweight CRM status JSON so the War Room can persist contacted/responded/won states.
Generate one n8n workflow per vertical and include a client-facing diagram page for each.
Add a quote calculator that maps offer tier + automation complexity into setup/monthly pricing.
Build a screenshot-proof vault that saves before/after image paths with claim guardrails.
Create a school-safe Vercel deployment page with one-click links to the exact public assets Bradley needs.
